name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Centered simple
description: CTA section with centered headline and actions in a compact block.

name: Centered with background image
description: CTA section with centered call-to-action over a background image hero.

name: Centered minimal
description: CTA section with minimal centered copy with reduced decoration and spacing.

name: Left content, right image
description: CTA section with split layout with text/actions left and image right.

name: Left image, right content
description: CTA section with split layout with image left and text/actions right.

name: Newletter
description: CTA section with newsletter signup focus with email capture and submit action.

name: Newletter inline
description: CTA section with single-row inline newsletter form with compact controls.

name: Simple banner
description: CTA section with full-width banner strip with concise message and action.

name: Banner with CTA
description: CTA section with banner bar with emphasized call-to-action button grouping.

name: With Stats
description: CTA section with call-to-action block that includes supporting metric highlights.

name: Neobrutalism
description: CTA section with high-contrast neobrutalist styling with hard edges and bold outlines.
